class DiscountMiddleware:
    def __init__(self, app):
        self.app = app

    def __call__(self, scope, receive, send):
        # Violation: implementing business logic (discount calculation) in middleware
        if scope["path"] == "/checkout":
            user = get_user(scope)
            if user.is_premium:
                apply_premium_discount(scope)
        return self.app(scope, receive, send)
